name: Heart Healthy Mud Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix the graham cracker crumbs, unsweetened cocoa, sugar, cinnamon, applesauce, and margarine until combined.
2. Press the mixture evenly on the bottom and side of a 9-inch pie pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for approximately 10 minutes until firm. Allow to cool completely.
4. Spread softened nonfat frozen coffee yogurt evenly over the crust to form the filling.
5. Place the pie in the freezer until ready to serve.
6. Before serving, drizzle with chocolate syrup.
